description_long: This is a three-story stone hardware store with a steep, dark slate roof and a prominent stone chimney on one side. The front facade features three tall arched windows on each of the upper two floors, and a large storefront at street level with wide display windows and a central entrance. The stonework is rustic and irregular, giving the building a historic, traditional appearance. The rear and side walls are constructed from the same rough stone, with fewer and smaller windows, and a single back door. The roof includes skylights and is slightly asymmetrical due to the chimney placement. The overall structure is narrow and deep, typical of older European urban commercial buildings.
description: A narrow, three-story stone hardware store with arched windows, a slate roof, and a prominent street-level storefront.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large display windows, and three rows of arched windows above.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the rough stone wall, prominent chimney, and lack of windows or doors.
description_view_2: Rear view with a single door, several windows, and the same stone construction as the front.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to the other side, with rough stonework and no visible openings.
attribute_storefront_signage: A red and white sign with a wrench and hammer icon is visible above the entrance, centered on the storefront.
attribute_storefront_layout: The storefront features a central entrance flanked by large display windows, with arched windows above and a sign above the door. The facade is symmetrical and framed by stonework.
